ruling_confirmations.A3_assumption_state: withhold ALL axis_params.corrections[] (base world, A intact, no corrections applied); filter tests the flip between base and FULLY-corrected states
ruling_confirmations.A2_assumption_state: withhold the endorsement SOURCES at axis_params.scoped_exceptions[].source_id (rule-without-exception world)
ruling_confirmations.top_level_selection: max dose_level record per family (uniform across axes; A2 top = max scoped-exception level)
